title: Linkification: String::replace double-substitution
description: Using html.replace(&match, &link) for mention/hashtag linkification corrupts content when the replacement text contains the search string. Must use replacen(..., 1) or a different approach. Check Broadside's render_content / linkification.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: content.rs uses position-based right-to-left replace_range from pre-collected matches. No .replace() on content strings.
